 {"id":"bd-3m5y","title":"Unit Tests: lipgloss Style composition","description":"Unit tests for lipgloss style composition and rendering.

## Current State
lipgloss has basic style tests but needs:
- Complete style inheritance testing
- All style property combinations
- ANSI output verification
- Unicode width handling

## Test Requirements

### Style Properties
- [ ] foreground/background colors (named, hex, ANSI256, RGB)
- [ ] bold/italic/underline/strikethrough
- [ ] padding (all directions)
- [ ] margin (all directions)
- [ ] border (all styles)
- [ ] width/height/max-width/max-height
- [ ] align (left, center, right)

### Style Composition
- [ ] Style::inherit() copies properties
- [ ] Style::copy() creates independent copy
- [ ] Property override precedence
- [ ] Unset vs default values

### Rendering
- [ ] Style::render() produces correct ANSI
- [ ] Multi-line content handling
- [ ] Padding with borders
- [ ] Margin with alignment
- [ ] Width truncation and padding

### Edge Cases
- [ ] Empty string rendering
- [ ] Very long lines
- [ ] Unicode characters (emojis, CJK)
- [ ] Nested ANSI sequences in content

## Success Criteria
- Every style property has dedicated tests
- Composition rules are fully tested
- ANSI output matches expected sequences","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GreenCastle","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:51:49.043249336Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T20:44:29.683451059Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T20:44:29.683383904Z","close_reason":"Added 100+ comprehensive unit tests for lipgloss Style composition. Tests cover: text attributes (bold/italic/underline/strikethrough/reverse/blink/faint), colors (hex/ANSI256/RGB/adaptive), dimensions (width/height/max-width/max-height), alignment, padding, margin, borders (all styles), style composition (clone/override), all unset methods, and rendering edge cases (empty strings, multiline, unicode, inline mode, nested ANSI).","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["lipgloss","testing","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3m5y","depends_on_id":"bd-28co","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mh2","title":"demo_showcase theme: semantic tokens + shared style helpers","description":"Build the styling foundation for the entire app.

Implement:
- A theme module that maps lipgloss `ThemeContext` (ColorSlots) into semantic UI primitives.
- Shared helpers: `card()`, `panel()`, `badge()`, `button()`, `table_style()`, `modal()`, `status_bar()`, etc.

Guidelines:
- No ad-hoc hex strings scattered across pages.
- Prefer semantic roles (primary/success/warn/error/muted) and allow theme switching.

Acceptance:
- A page can be built using only shared style helpers + minimal page-specific overrides.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:23.252512028Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T00:37:33.002106933Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T00:37:33.002041060Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","lipgloss","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mh2","depends_on_id":"bd-2ucj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mh2","depends_on_id":"bd-39zu","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mh2","depends_on_id":"bd-cakm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mmj","title":"Conformance runner: include glow + wish crates","description":"`run-conformance` currently omits glow and wish despite having modules and dependencies, which makes conformance look complete while skipping entire libraries.

Scope:
- Add glow + wish to `tests/conformance/src/bin/run_conformance.rs` crate list (gated behind feature for wish).
- Update `tests/conformance/src/bin/generate_report.rs` similarly.
- Ensure no SKIPPED results; runner must fail if any skip occurs (already enforced).

Acceptance:
- `cargo run -p charmed_conformance --bin run-conformance -- --summary-only` includes glow + wish counts and still has 0 skipped.
- CI output flags failures if glow/wish conformance breaks.
","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"RusticDeer","created_at":"2026-02-10T03:53:37.104603200Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T04:42:52.357432548Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T04:42:52.357367427Z","close_reason":"Conformance runner now includes glow+wish; wish conformance passes by implementing missing middlewares + chain/options fixture handling","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-3mq0","title":"Random deep-audit pass: cross-crate execution-flow bug hunt","description":"Randomly sample core source files across crates, trace call/import flow, identify concrete correctness/reliability defects, and land fixes with tests and full gates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-11T06:24:55.819038253Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T06:33:12.165517043Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T06:33:12.165430002Z","close_reason":"Implemented wish exec argv parsing fix for quoted/escaped/empty args + tests; full cargo fmt/check/clippy and charmed-wish tests pass","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3mtt","title":"demo_showcase core: command palette (search + actions)","description":"Optional but very compelling polish feature: a command palette ("quick actions") that makes the app feel modern.

Why:
- It dramatically improves discoverability and speed for power users.
- It showcases composing bubbles components (textinput + list) into a cohesive UX.

UX:
- Trigger:
  - `/` (or another agreed key) opens the palette
  - `esc` closes
- Layout:
  - text input at top
  - filtered list of commands below
- Behavior:
  - fuzzy-ish matching over command names + keywords
  - enter runs selected action
  - shows short descriptions and shortcuts (optional)

Actions to include (minimum):
- Navigation:
  - jump to Dashboard/Jobs/Docs/Wizard/Files/Logs/Settings
- Toggles:
  - toggle theme picker / cycle theme
  - toggle no-color / reduce-motion
- Utilities:
  - export current view (plain/HTML)
  - open diagnostics (pager / export)

Implementation guidance:
- Maintain a small registry of commands (id, title, keywords, handler).
- Handlers should emit bubbletea Cmds / messages (no direct side effects in UI code).

Acceptance:
- Palette is keyboard-friendly, fast, and feels integrated (not a bolted-on demo).
- Actions are safe in headless/self-check mode (no hangs).","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:08:02.480166189Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T00:49:01.414959597Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T00:49:01.414894065Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mtt","depends_on_id":"bd-14v4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mtt","depends_on_id":"bd-1aad","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mtt","depends_on_id":"bd-3j9x","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mwa","title":"Demo Showcase: migrate docs.rs to poison-safe RwLock","description":"# Migrate docs.rs RwLock usage to poison-safe pattern

## What
Replace all .read().unwrap() and .write().unwrap() calls in pages/docs.rs with
the chosen poison-safe mechanism.

## Affected Fields (5 RwLock instances)
1. viewport: RwLock<Viewport>
2. rendered_content: RwLock<String>
3. needs_render: RwLock<bool>
4. last_dims: RwLock<(usize, usize)>
5. last_theme: RwLock<String>

## Approximate Locations (~46 call sites)
This is the largest page by RwLock usage. Sites include:
- Lines 146, 152, 174, 181, 183, 195, 208, 223, 286, 295
- Lines 443, 446, 629, 633, 664, 672, 677, 681, 708, 716
- Lines 731, 735, 739, 743, 753, 772, 776, 779, 784, 791
- Lines 798-800, 831, 926, 929, 937, 948, 964
- Lines 1326, 1330, 1334, 1347, 1351, 1355

## Depends On
- bd-3v3x (create the mechanism first)

## Key File
- crates/demo_showcase/src/pages/docs.rs","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-29T17:40:46.176912269Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T23:51:14.641904209Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T23:51:14.641830622Z","close_reason":"Migration completed as part of bd-3v3x","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","reliability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mwa","depends_on_id":"bd-3v3x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mwa","depends_on_id":"bd-ykth","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":19,"issue_id":"bd-3mwa","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
1. Zero .read().unwrap() or .write().unwrap() on RwLock in docs.rs
2. All 46 call sites migrated to poison-safe pattern
3. cargo check -p demo_showcase passes
4. cargo test -p demo_showcase -- docs passes
5. Verify with: grep -n "unwrap()" crates/demo_showcase/src/pages/docs.rs | grep -E "read|write" returns empty

NOTE: This is the largest migration (46 sites). Consider parallel search-replace if using parking_lot.","created_at":"2026-01-29T23:47:13Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3mxk","title":"Jobs: progress visualization polish","description":"Polish job progress visualization so it looks like a modern CI dashboard (compelling, readable, information-dense).

Why:
- Progress UI is where “toy” demos instantly reveal themselves.
- This task should make the Jobs page feel premium even in a plain terminal.

Requirements:
- Use `bubbles::progress` for determinate progress:
  - clear fill, percentage (optional), and label
  - themed colors that match status (running/success/fail/cancel)
- Use spinners for indeterminate states:
  - e.g., “waiting”, “queued”, “uploading”, “finalizing”
- Status clarity:
  - icons/chips for state
  - duration + ETA-ish hint when possible
  - differentiate “stuck” vs “slow” (e.g., warn color after threshold)
- Visual polish:
  - consistent spacing and alignment across rows
  - good behavior in narrow widths (truncate/wrap rules)
  - respects `--no-color` (still readable) and `--no-animations`

Optional (nice if it’s easy):
- Stage-based progress (build/test/deploy) with per-stage completion markers.

Acceptance:
- Looks like a real CI dashboard.
- Clear at a glance: what’s running, what’s blocked, what failed, what finished.

Testing:
- Unit tests:
  - rendering decisions given job state (spinner vs bar, colors/labels)
  - width-constrained rendering produces stable output
- E2E:
  - wizard -> jobs scenario should assert at least one running job shows an updating progress indicator.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyRiver","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:10:23.217085325Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T23:52:54.759132044Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T23:52:54.759063957Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","jobs","progress"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-1dr6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-3rwl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3mxk","depends_on_id":"bd-7jxu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-10T01:57:04Z","created_by":"import"}]}
